channel.title: West Seattle Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for West Seattle Events

item.title: Trivia Night @ Alki
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 2536 Alki Avenue Southwest, Seattle, WA, 98116

Teams up to 6 people welcome and free to play with prizes for the top 2 teams.

From Future Primitive Brewing

Event details

item.title: Trivia Night @ Alki
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 2536 Alki Avenue Southwest, Seattle, WA, 98116

Teams up to 6 people welcome and free to play with prizes for the top 2 teams.

From Future Primitive Brewing

Event details

item.title: West Seattle Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: California Ave SW & SW Alaska St, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market in the West Seattle Junction. Local produce, artisan foods, and community events.

From West Seattle Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Trivia Night @ Alki
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 2536 Alki Avenue Southwest, Seattle, WA, 98116

Teams up to 6 people welcome and free to play with prizes for the top 2 teams.

From Future Primitive Brewing

item.title: Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 3803 Delridge Way SW, Seattle

Weekly open mic with full backline provided and 16-track recording available. Free sign-up.

From Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: How to Manage End-of-Life Planning with Ill or Reluctant Loved Ones
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

Join us to learn about ways to approach end-of-life planning with loved ones.

From SPL - West Seattle Branch

Event details

item.title: How To Write an Obituary (your own or someone else’s)
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

This workshop includes ideas for how to interview family members and what can be learned by writing our own obituary.

From SPL - West Seattle Branch

Event details

item.title: West Seattle Art Walk
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: West Seattle

Monthly art walk in West Seattle

From West Seattle Art Walk
